name: local-memory-mcp
description: Persistent local memory for any MCP client. SQLite + FTS5 + sqlite-vec hybrid retrieval, bi-temporal asOf, contradiction detection, LLM-free reflection. No cloud, no API keys.
long_description: Local-first persistent memory for AI agents. Stores learnings, decisions, sessions, entities, observations in a single SQLite file under your OS data dir. 21 tools spanning sessions, learnings, decisions, knowledge graph, lifecycle management, and reflection. v2.0 added sqlite-vec-backed vector search and a Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) hybrid retrieval layer over FTS5 + cosine similarity, with multilingual embeddings via the Xenova/multilingual-e5-small Transformers.js model (DE/EN/ES/100+ languages). v2.1 adds bi-temporal asOf queries on entity_open ("what did I know on date X?"), an LLM-free contradiction scanner that surfaces semantically-similar observation pairs with disagreeing negation/confidence, learn_archive + learn_update for lifecycle management, and a memory_reflect aggregation pass (most-used + stale learnings, hot entities, open decisions, returned as structured data + markdown summary). Zero cloud, zero API keys, MIT licensed. Designed as the zero-config default for darwin-agents. If the vector extension can't load on a given platform, the server transparently falls back to FTS5-only search.

db_path.title: Database file path
db_path.description: Where to store the SQLite memory database. Leave default to use the OS data directory.

disable_embeddings.title: Disable vector embeddings
disable_embeddings.description: Set to '1' to disable the local embedding pipeline and run FTS5-only search. Useful in restricted networks where the model can't be downloaded. Default empty = embeddings enabled.

embed_cache_dir.title: Embedding model cache directory
embed_cache_dir.description: Override the Transformers.js cache directory (where the ~120MB multilingual-e5-small model is stored). Default empty = OS data directory.

tools.name: memory_session_start
tools.description: Start a session (loads prior context)

tools.name: memory_session_end
tools.description: End a session (persists summary)

tools.name: memory_learn
tools.description: Store a learning (pattern/mistake/insight). Auto-embeds for hybrid search.

tools.name: memory_recall
tools.description: Quick keyword recall on learnings, or omit query for most-recent.

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Hybrid search (FTS5 BM25 + vector cosine via RRF). Modes: fts/vector/hybrid (default).

tools.name: memory_decide
tools.description: Log a decision with reasoning + alternatives. Auto-embeds.

tools.name: memory_entity_create
tools.description: Create a knowledge graph entity

tools.name: memory_entity_observe
tools.description: Add an observation to an entity. Auto-embeds.

tools.name: memory_entity_search
tools.description: Search entities by name + observation text

tools.name: memory_entity_open
tools.description: Load entity with all observations + relations. Optional asOf for bi-temporal point-in-time view.

tools.name: memory_entity_relate
tools.description: Relate two entities (edge in KG)

tools.name: memory_entity_delete
tools.description: Delete an entity (with confirm)

tools.name: memory_learn_archive
tools.description: Soft-delete a learning. Row stays for asOf-style queries, never resurfaces in recall/search.

tools.name: memory_learn_update
tools.description: Edit a live learning (content/confidence/tags). Re-embeds atomically when content changes.

tools.name: memory_contradictions
tools.description: LLM-free scanner: observation pairs with high cosine similarity but disagreeing negation/confidence. Requires sqlite-vec.

tools.name: memory_reflect
tools.description: Aggregation pass: most-used + stale learnings, hot entities, open decisions. Returns structured data + markdown summary.

tools.name: memory_insights
tools.description: Stats and breakdowns (sessions, learnings, decisions, categories, entity types)

tools.name: memory_profile
tools.description: Read or write a profile field (name, role, preferences, language, timezone)

tools.name: memory_guide
tools.description: Built-in help. Topics: quickstart, session, search, entities, learn, privacy.

tools.name: memory_goal
tools.description: Read, set, or clear the current user goal

tools.name: memory_health
tools.description: SQLite integrity, vector status, schema version, DB size
